overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit commercial district at night. The scene features a blend of traditional Japanese architecture with futuristic cyberpunk elements, including holographic cherry blossom trees, glowing color-changing floor panels, and vibrant digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food vendor stall

events.description: camera slows and stops briefly at the food stall counter
turns away from stall to proceed down the street

agents.ego_description: approaches the food stall and pauses briefly before the vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind counter holding a tablet

entered.detail: wooden stall with zebra-print facade and illuminated food display cases
black rack with colorful magazine covers
overhead wooden beams and corrugated metal roof
bright green bar stools near the counter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a covered food stall in a cyberpunk market area. The camera approaches a vendor standing behind a zebra-print counter with illuminated food displays. After pausing briefly, the camera turns to continue down the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with traditional Japanese architecture

events.description: exits the covered stall area into the open pedestrian street
large holographic cherry blossom tree becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking down the street toward the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket ascending stairs to the pavilion

entered.detail: wooden structure with red paper lanterns and stone columns
large tree with glowing pink digital blossoms
illuminated commercial signs including Cirrus Cola

segments.scene_description: Leaving the food stall behind, the camera walks along a pedestrian street lined with a traditional Japanese pavilion on the left featuring red lanterns. In the distance, a massive holographic cherry blossom tree with glowing pink petals becomes visible, while neon billboards illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic tree installation and color-changing floor panels

events.description: floor panels illuminate with blue light
floor panels shift from blue to green
floor panels shift from green to yellow

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing other pedestrians on the glowing walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and pink hair walking ahead on the glowing path

entered.detail: illuminated walkway panels that shift between blue, green, and yellow
red and white striped blockades lining the path

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an open plaza dominated by a massive holographic cherry blossom tree with glowing pink petals. The walkway features illuminated floor panels that cycle through colors—shifting from blue to green to yellow as the camera progresses. Pedestrians walk along the glowing path while concrete barriers line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with large digital billboards and advertising

events.description: floor panels shift from yellow to red
passing by the Cirrus Cola and Nicola billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing along the glowing walkway past advertising billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking alongside the path

entered.detail: large blue and red advertisement for Cirrus Cola
white advertisement for Nicola brand with product image
benches positioned in front of the billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the walkway where the floor panels glow red. Large billboards for Cirrus Cola and Nicola dominate the right side, with benches placed in front for viewers. The holographic tree now appears to the left rear as the camera moves deeper into the commercial district, passing pedestrians in futuristic attire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped market stall into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial plaza. It begins at a covered food stall, approaching a vendor behind a zebra-print counter before turning to follow a pedestrian walkway. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal a traditional Japanese pavilion with red lanterns on the left and vibrant neon billboards on the right, leading toward a massive holographic cherry blossom tree in the distance. The path then expands into a wide plaza where the camera glides over illuminated floor panels that cycle through blue, green, and yellow hues beneath the glowing pink petals of the holographic tree. Finally, the walkway shifts to a deep red glow as the camera passes futuristic pedestrians and large Cirrus Cola and Nicola billboards, leaving the tree behind to move deeper into the district.
